Dysphagia Knowledge Hub — 吞嚥困難知識庫

Dysphagia Clinical Resource Collection

This section provides evidence-based clinical guides for speech-language therapists, physicians, and allied health professionals managing dysphagia across a wide range of neurological and oncological conditions. Includes rehabilitation protocols, assessment pathways, and ethical decision frameworks.

All Clinical Guides

  • ALS (Motor Neuron Disease) and Dysphagia: Clinical Management Across Disease Stages
  • Aspiration Pneumonia: Why Dysphagia Causes It and How Texture-Modified Diets Prevent It
  • Dysphagia in End-of-Life Care: Comfort Feeding, Risk Feeding, and the Tube Feeding Debate
  • Dysphagia in Dementia — Feeding Strategies, Comfort Feeding, and the Hard Decisions
  • Dysphagia in Parkinson’s Disease — Symptoms, Progression, Diet Adjustments
  • Dysphagia Signs and Symptoms Every Caregiver Should Watch For
  • Dysphagia Testing — 10+ Clinical Assessment Methods
  • Esophageal Dysphagia: Assessment and Management Guide for Clinicians
  • Esophageal vs Oropharyngeal Dysphagia: How to Tell Them Apart
  • Head and Neck Cancer Dysphagia: Rehabilitation Guide for Patients and SLPs
  • Multiple Sclerosis and Dysphagia: Clinical Management and Long-Term Care
  • Parkinson’s Disease and Dysphagia — A Complete Management Guide 2026
  • Pediatric Dysphagia — IDDSI for Children, Particle Size Limits, and Feeding the Medically Complex Child
  • Post-COVID Dysphagia and Long COVID Swallowing Difficulties
  • Presbyphagia vs Pathological Dysphagia — Normal Aging, Sarcopenic Dysphagia, and When to Screen
  • Sarcopenic Dysphagia — the Wakabayashi Framework, Diagnostic Algorithm, and Rehabilitation Nutrition
  • Silent Aspiration in Dysphagia — Why Patients Aspirate Without Coughing
  • Stroke and Dysphagia: Recovery Timeline, Retraining the Swallow, and When to Upgrade Diet Levels
  • Dysphagia After Stroke: Screening, Aspiration Risk, and Swallowing Rehabilitation
  • Swallowing Therapy Exercises: Evidence-Based Rehabilitation for Dysphagia
  • Traditional Chinese Medicine and Dysphagia: Bridging Eastern and Western Approaches
  • The Thickened Fluids Controversy — Robbins 2008, Adverse Events, and the 2024–2026 Evidence Shift
  • Tongue Strengthening Exercises for Dysphagia — Evidence-Based Protocols and Devices
  • Tube Feeding Decision in Dysphagia: When Oral Feeding Becomes Unsafe
  • Xerostomia and Dysphagia — How Dry Mouth Worsens Swallowing and What to Do About It
